title: Have anyone key-in sub-item then refresh item missing?
excerpt: have anyone key-in sub-item then refresh item missing?

posts.author: Jasmine_Goh (Jasmine)
posts.cookedHtml: have anyone key-in sub-item then refresh item missing?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jasmine_Goh ,

Do you have a filter on your board where you are entering items?
If you have a filter and you type in an item that does not match the filter, the item will “disappear”. It will still appear when you remove any type of filter, but that could be what is causing this issue for you
